data.title: Ethereum Whale Completes Profitable Sale Amid Price Surge
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, an on-chain analyst known as Ai Yi has reported that a significant Ethereum (ETH) whale has completed a profitable transaction. Following a recent price surge in ETH, the whale executed their final limit sell order, selling 5,000 ETH at a price of $3,895 each. This transaction amounted to approximately $19.475 million, marking the conclusion of the whale's fourth profitable trading cycle.

data.title: Block Reports Increased Revenue and Bitcoin Holdings in Q2
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Block, the payment platform founded by Twitter co-founder Jack Dorsey, has released its second-quarter financial report. The company reported a gross profit of $2.54 billion, marking a 14% increase compared to the same period last year. Net income attributable to common stockholders reached $538.46 million, a significant rise from $195.27 million in the previous year.

Block also increased its Bitcoin holdings by 108 BTC, bringing its total to 8,692 BTC. However, the company recorded a revaluation loss of $212.17 million due to a decline in Bitcoin's fair value, contrasting with a revaluation gain of $70.12 million in the same quarter last year.

data.title: CleanSpark reports record revenue in ‘most successful’ quarter ever
data.description:
CleanSpark’s results for its Q3 saw revenues reach nearly $200 million, jumping 91% from the same time a year ago.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cleanspark-record-revenue-most-successful-quarter-ever?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: CleanSpark Reports Record Quarterly Revenue and Profitability
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin miner CleanSpark has announced its most successful quarterly results to date, surpassing analyst expectations with record revenue and profitability. For the third quarter, spanning April to June, CleanSpark reported revenue of $198.6 million, marking a 91% increase from the $104 million recorded in the same period last year. This figure exceeded analyst predictions of approximately $195 million. CleanSpark CEO Zach Bradford highlighted the quarter as the most successful in the company's history, attributing the results to the strength of their strategic approach.

CleanSpark also reported a quarterly net income of $257.4 million, a significant turnaround from the $236.2 million loss experienced in the previous year. The company's diluted earnings per share reached 78 cents, far exceeding the anticipated 20 cents per share. Chief Financial Officer Gary Vecchiarelli described the fiscal third quarter as pivotal, noting that operational expenses were fully funded through monthly Bitcoin production while simultaneously expanding their Bitcoin treasury.

In a notable achievement, CleanSpark claimed to be the first public mining company in the United States to reach 50 exahashes per second, managing 5.8% of the global hashrate. Bradford emphasized that this milestone was achieved exclusively with American infrastructure. The firm expanded its Bitcoin treasury to over $1 billion in value without raising capital through equity offerings in 2025. Currently, CleanSpark holds 12,703 BTC, valued at approximately $1.48 billion at current market prices, ranking it as the ninth-largest Bitcoin holder among public companies.

Despite these impressive results, CleanSpark's shares (CLSK) closed down over 2.5% at $10.72 on Thursday, with only a slight after-hours increase that settled to less than a 1% gain. Since the beginning of 2025, CleanSpark's shares have risen by 16.4%, outperforming sector leader MARA Holdings, which has seen a decline of over 7% this year.

The quarter has been favorable for Bitcoin mining firms overall, driven by a 32% increase in the asset's value during the period. In late July, MARA Holdings exceeded analyst expectations with a 64% year-on-year revenue increase to $238 million in its second-quarter earnings. Similarly, Riot Platforms reported a record net income of $219.5 million for the same period.

data.title: XRP Bull Flag Points to $8 as Ripple-SEC Case Reaches End
data.description:
The recent formation of a bull flag pattern in XRP's price chart strongly suggests that the cryptocurrency could surge to a target price of $8, especially as the long-awaited conclusion of the Ripple versus SEC legal battle approaches. This development has attracted significant attention from traders and investors alike, who are closely watching the outcome of the case, as it could have major implications for the future of Ripple and the broader cryptocurrency market.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/08/08/xrp-bull-flag-points-to-usd8-as-ripple-sec-case-reaches-end

data.title: Animoca, Standard Chartered and HKT Form Stablecoin Venture
data.description:
Animoca, Standard Chartered, and HKT launch Anchorpoint Financial in Hong Kong to issue licensed stablecoins.
source: https://coincu.com/353325-animoca-stablecoin-venture-hong-kong

data.title: Animoca Brands Forms Joint Venture for Stablecoin Development in Hong Kong
data.description:
According to PANews, Animoca Brands has partnered with Standard Chartered Bank (Hong Kong) and Hong Kong Telecom (HKT) to establish a joint venture named Anchorpoint Financial Limited in Hong Kong. The venture aims to develop a business model focused on the issuance and promotion of licensed stablecoins. Anchorpoint has officially expressed its intention to the Hong Kong Monetary Authority to apply for a stablecoin issuer license when the Stablecoin Ordinance comes into effect on August 1, 2025.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28022893548314?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.description:

data.title: Ethereum Founder Warns of Potential Risks in Treasury Expansion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin has commented on the expansion of Ethereum treasury companies, which has broadened access for a wider range of investors to acquire ETH. However, he cautioned that if not managed properly, this trend could develop into an "over-leveraged game."

data.title: Whale Trader Increases Long Positions Amid Market Activity
data.description:
According to PANews, on-chain analyst Yu Jin has reported that the whale trader known as @AguilaTrades has been actively increasing long positions through TWAP after initially opening them yesterday afternoon. The current value of these long positions has reached $223 million. Previously, this trader has experienced losses after increasing positions to $400 million five consecutive times.

Currently, the trader holds an unrealized profit of $4.76 million. The positions include a 40x leveraged long on 1,277 BTC, valued at $150 million, with an entry price of $115,968 and a liquidation price of $112,932. Additionally, there is a 25x leveraged long on 18,833 ETH, valued at $73.64 million, with an entry price of $3,774 and a liquidation price of $3,600.

data.title: Hong Kong's Ed Financial Group Partners with Zhongnong Rongxin for Agricultural Tokenization
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Hong Kong's Ed Financial Group has announced a strategic partnership with Zhongnong Rongxin, a rural digital asset service operator. The collaboration aims to advance agricultural tokenization projects and explore fundraising opportunities in Hong Kong, enhancing Zhongnong Rongxin's market position in agricultural fintech.

Zhongnong Rongxin will be responsible for selecting, integrating, and managing foundational assets related to agriculture and rural areas in China, coordinating cross-regional project resources, and providing high-quality assets. Ed Financial has been appointed as the exclusive advisor for capital market and technology-related matters. Their role includes designing tokenization structures for rural and agricultural product assets, executing real-world asset securitization, and facilitating overseas financing, mergers and acquisitions, and IPOs. Ed Financial will offer comprehensive sponsorship and underwriting support for these capital market transactions.

data.title: AI-Web3 Innovation Fund Opens for Applications
data.description: According to PANews, the pSTAKE Foundation has announced the launch of its $50 million AI-Web3 Innovation Fund, now open for applications. This initiative aims to accelerate research, development, and collaboration in the cutting-edge fields of generative artificial intelligence and decentralized networks. The fund focuses on five strategic areas: decentralized generative agents, which are fully on-chain autonomous AI entities; on-chain provenance, ensuring transparent attribution for datasets, models, and agent outputs; market layers for AI assets, including valuation, exchange, and collateral protocols; programmable creative engines for AI-driven dynamic multimedia; and secure, composable infrastructure for building interoperable AI-Web3 systems.
